title: Midnight Bryndza Braise
description: A silky and citrusy midnight-craving American dish featuring bryndza cheese poached in a gluten-free friendly broth.
instructions: Prepare a pot with vegetable stock and add bryndza cheese, orange juice, lemon juice, ginger, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Bring the mixture to a boil then reduce heat to low. Simmer for about 20 minutes or until the cheese is fully melted and the sauce thickens slightly.
Remove from heat and let it cool for a few minutes before ladling into oven-safe dishes.
Bake in preheated oven for approximately 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown on top. Serve warm with a side of fresh fruit salsa.
